name: Justin Wilson's Hush Puppies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all dry ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Add eggs, buttermilk, green onion, and bacon drippings to the dry mixture. Mix well until just combined.
3. Using a spoon or scoop, drop batter into deep hot fat.
4. Fry until golden brown on all sides.
Note: The recipe yields approximately 48 hush puppies.
